title: Requirement Specification Structure
description: JSON representation of the formal structure from Li & Zheng (2025), Equation 1: <Pre-conditions [Previous Step]; Actor; Action; Business Objects; [To actor]; [Post-conditions]>

useCaseId.description: Unique identifier for the use case (e.g., 'UC-01')

steps.description: Ordered sequence of structured requirement steps

structuredStep.description: A single requirement normalized into the formal structure (Eq. 1)

precondition.description: Prerequisite state or condition for this step

previousStep.description: Explicit reference to the prior step in sequence

businessObject.description: The real-world business entity being acted upon (e.g., 'Order', NOT attributes like 'buyer name')

toActor.description: Recipient of the action, if directed toward another actor

postcondition.description: State that holds after successful execution of this step

refUseCaseId.description: Pointer to an existing use case if this step is defined elsewhere (Eq. 2 simplified form)

flowType.description: Which flow this step belongs to

deviationPoint.description: For alternative/exception steps: the basic flow step this deviates from (e.g., '3' for step 3a1)

rejoinPoint.description: For alternative/exception steps: the basic flow step to rejoin after this flow completes
